definition: Auto insurance PPI YoY
economic_rationale: Insurance pricing cycle proxy
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Insurance native and already available

definition: Used car CPI YoY
economic_rationale: Claims severity proxy
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Direct physical damage inflation driver

definition: Medical CPI YoY
economic_rationale: Bodily injury severity proxy
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Direct severity component already in matrix
notes: Pair with used car CPI later

definition: Acceleration in combined ratio trend
economic_rationale: Underwriting trend change is often priced faster than level
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Repo-native proxy for report ideas
key_risks: Can be noisy around cat events
notes: Immediate stand-in for monthly combined ratio delta

definition: PGR six month return minus peer basket
economic_rationale: Relative industry momentum isolates PGR alpha
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: More target aligned than raw short momentum

definition: Unearned premium YoY growth
economic_rationale: Forward revenue inventory signal
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Smoother leading signal than generic growth
notes: Already available but not in current winner

definition: Policies in force YoY growth
economic_rationale: Unit growth and market share signal
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Direct business volume measure already available
key_risks: Can be less useful without pricing context
notes: Existing feature to retest in Ridge

definition: Auto insurance PPI YoY minus severity index YoY
economic_rationale: Pricing versus loss cost is core P and C mechanism
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Direct replacement for ambiguous exposure proxy

definition: Average of used car and medical inflation YoY
economic_rationale: Claims severity pressure indicator
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Causal severity signal versus generic macro

definition: Auto insurance PPI YoY minus auto insurance CPI YoY
economic_rationale: Upstream versus retail pricing power spread
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Cleaner spread than single CPI or PPI series

definition: Monthly combined ratio relative to 96 target
economic_rationale: Underwriting profitability versus management hurdle
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: More stationary than raw level

definition: Short minus long PIF growth
economic_rationale: Second derivative of unit growth
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: May lead premium growth better than level alone

definition: Net premiums written per policy YoY
economic_rationale: Separates pricing power from count growth
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Improves on raw premium growth
key_risks: Mix shifts can distort average premium

definition: Written versus earned premium spread
economic_rationale: Pipeline growth versus runoff signal
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Closer to insurer revenue mechanics than price momentum

definition: Underwriting income over earned premium
economic_rationale: Core insurance profitability ratio
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Ratio is cleaner than nominal dollars

definition: Loss reserves over earned premium
economic_rationale: Reserve adequacy and earnings quality signal
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Insurer-specific risk channel versus generic credit proxy
key_risks: bad and growth effects can mix
notes: Lower priority than margin and pricing family

definition: Book value per share YoY growth
economic_rationale: Insurance intrinsic value compounding signal
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: More comprehensive than buyback or nominal income
key_risks: OCI effects can distort short-term moves

definition: Fixed income duration times 10Y yield change
economic_rationale: Bond book and benchmark rate sensitivity
expected_direction: negative when duration and rates rise
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: More structural than raw curve shape

definition: Direct channel share of policies in force
economic_rationale: Structural margin moat from channel mix
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Slow moat signal absent from current winner
notes: Use if channel data is clean

definition: YoY change in direct channel mix
economic_rationale: Channel shift acceleration signal
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Potentially faster than level share

definition: Realized gains as share of net income
economic_rationale: Earnings quality and repeatability proxy
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Quality dimension missing from current winner
key_risks: Can blow up when income is small

definition: Unrealized gains over equity
economic_rationale: OCI and capital flexibility proxy
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Can explain valuation behavior around rate shocks

definition: Trailing loss ratio
economic_rationale: Claims cost pressure isolated from expenses
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Decomposes combined ratio into a more causal part

definition: Trailing expense ratio
economic_rationale: Distribution efficiency and operating leverage signal
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Complements loss ratio and may be smoother
notes: Pair with loss ratio after individual tests

definition: Broad trade-weighted USD three month return
economic_rationale: Key driver for VXUS VWO GLD and DBC denominator
expected_direction: positive for PGR versus exUS and real assets
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: High benchmark relevance with low complexity

definition: Broad trade-weighted USD six month return
economic_rationale: Longer horizon USD regime signal
expected_direction: positive for PGR versus exUS and GLD
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Useful horizon variant if 3m signal underfits

definition: WTI three month return
economic_rationale: Energy and broad commodity benchmark driver
expected_direction: negative for PGR versus VDE and DBC
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Targets VDE and DBC directly

definition: Thirty year mortgage rate minus ten year treasury
economic_rationale: Direct VMBS spread driver
expected_direction: positive for PGR versus VMBS when spread widens
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Better VMBS denominator anchor than curve curvature

definition: Baa corporate minus ten year treasury spread
economic_rationale: Smoother credit stress regime proxy
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Potentially cleaner than HY spread

definition: HY spread divided by IG spread
economic_rationale: Purer risk appetite ratio than raw HY spread
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Reduces collinearity if IG series is added
notes: Build only if easy point-in-time IG source exists

definition: Ten year breakeven inflation level
economic_rationale: Inflation expectation driver for GLD DBC and bonds
expected_direction: mixed by benchmark but useful for relative return
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Missing macro dimension in current winner
key_risks: bonds and gold may react differently

definition: Three month change in breakeven inflation
economic_rationale: Inflation acceleration regime signal
expected_direction: positive for GLD and DBC relative strength
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: More tactical than level and likely tree friendly
key_risks: Can be noisy around policy shifts

definition: Six month change in ten year real yield
economic_rationale: Trajectory of real rates for GLD BND and VOO
expected_direction: negative for GLD and bonds when rising
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: May outperform the static real rate level
key_risks: Can overlap with rate shock family
notes: Compare to existing real rate level

definition: Ten year term premium level
economic_rationale: Purer duration risk pricing than simple slope
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Could improve bond denominator modeling
notes: Lower priority than mortgage spread and real yield

definition: GLD six month return minus BND six month return
economic_rationale: Cross-asset fear and safety regime signal
expected_direction: negative for PGR when gold outruns bonds
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: More target aligned than generic raw momentum
key_risks: Can false positive in rate-cut cycles

definition: DBC six month return minus VOO six month return
economic_rationale: Real asset versus financial asset regime signal
expected_direction: negative for PGR when commodities lead
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Adds inflation regime context without more raw macro series

definition: Legal services PPI relative to broad PPI
economic_rationale: Social inflation proxy for casualty reserving
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Captures a risk channel not covered elsewhere

definition: Gasoline retail sales YoY change
economic_rationale: Physical energy demand proxy for VDE and DBC
expected_direction: negative for PGR versus energy when rising
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: More demand-centric than oil price alone
key_risks: Nominal sales mix price and volume

definition: VWO six month return minus VXUS six month return
economic_rationale: EM versus developed exUS risk appetite signal
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Specific denominator feature for international block

definition: PGR combined ratio minus peer combined ratio
economic_rationale: Relative underwriting edge versus industry
expected_direction: negative when PGR is worse than peers
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Direct alpha versus beta underwriting feature

definition: PGR price to book divided by sector price to book
economic_rationale: Insurance valuation mean reversion signal
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: More industry-native than PE ratio

definition: PGR PE divided by market PE
economic_rationale: Relative valuation versus broad market
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Strips out broad market multiple expansion
notes: Lower priority than P to B

definition: Market earnings yield minus ten year treasury yield
economic_rationale: VOO versus bond allocation anchor
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Direct broad equity denominator feature

definition: Operating cash flow over market cap
economic_rationale: Stationary cash generation metric for Ridge
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Fixes nominal dollar scaling problem
key_risks: Cash flow lumpy and lower frequency
notes: Build only if quarterly timing handled safely

definition: Annualized premium over equity
economic_rationale: Operating leverage and capital strain metric
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Insurance specific balance-sheet risk feature

definition: Residual credit risk premium beyond fundamentals
economic_rationale: Refined risk appetite indicator
why_it_might_outperform_existing_feature: Stronger literature support than raw spread
key_risks: More complex than v15 should start with
notes: Stretch item after simpler credit features
